aka get_by_role("heading", name="Add User") Call log: - Expect "to_have_text" with timeout 5000ms - waiting for locator("h6") Details: self = page = def test_Admin_page(self,page): login = LoginPage(page) dashboard = DashboardPage(page) login.load() login.login("Admin", "admin123") dashboard.verify_admin_adding_new_user() > dashboard.adding_user_details() orange_hrm\test\test_login.py:41: _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ self = def adding_user_details(self): dropdowns = self.page.locator("div.oxd-select-text") dropdowns.nth(0).click() self.page.locator(".oxd-select-option", has_text="Admin").click() field = self.page.get_by_placeholder("Type for hints...") field.fill("test") # use partial text self.page.wait_for_selector(".oxd-autocomplete-option") self.page.locator(".oxd-autocomplete-option").nth(2).click() dropdowns = self.page.locator("div.oxd-select-text") dropdowns.nth(1).click() # Select option self.page.locator(".oxd-select-option", has_text="Enabled").click() # Username # self.page.locator('input.oxd-input').nth(1).fill("vimal12345") # self.page.locator('input[type="password"]').nth(0).fill("Admin@123456") # self.page.locator('input[type="password"]').nth(1).fill("Admin@123456") # self.page.get_by_role("button", name="Save").click() username = "vimal" + str(int(time.time())) password = "Admin@123" # ✅ Wait for Add User page > expect(self.page.locator("h6")).to_have_text("Add User") E AssertionError: Locator expected to have text 'Add User' E Actual value: None E Error: strict mode violation: locator("h6") resolved to 2 elements: E 1)
